releaseNotes: 🚀 Nexly Weekly Digest is here! Premium 5-part intel dropping every Sun @ 6 PM.
🧠 F1-F4 Pipeline: Advanced algorithms for trend scoring, deduplication & ranking.
💎 Hidden Gems: New F3 logic uncovers high-quality, pre-viral content.
📈 Emerging Topics: Engine tracks keyword growth to spot rising trends early.
✨ Cinematic UI: Staggered lists, count-up stats & premium Lottie animations.
🎨 Visual Polish: Deep Navy Dark Mode & 'Paper' Light Mode for max readability.
🛠️ Platform Stability: Android nav fixes & better content matching across sources.
